$comment: Source manifest for the BB plugin component registry (plugin design §5.5). `uiItems` lists the shadcn-shaped components under packages/shared-ui/src/components/ui that are published as registry:ui items; every file in their transitive import closure becomes its own item automatically (scripts/build-registry.mjs), so this list is the only thing to edit when adding a component. Non-registry shared-ui components (e.g. pill, empty-state) are excluded until deliberately listed. `overrides` can swap a shared-ui source file for a registry-only flavor (paths relative to packages/shared-ui/src → packages/plugin-registry/src); it is empty because @bb/shared-ui already ships the plugin/no-op flavor of the two environment leaves (portal-scope, useBrowserDimmingModal) and the app injects its own flavors at build time. `dependencyPins` forces npm versions where latest breaks the vendored source.
